Your Treatment Need?

Which dental concern can we Resolve for you?

Click on a concern to learn more about our superspeciality solutions.

Missing Teeth

Permanent tooth replacement with Laser Implants.

Crooked Teeth

Straighten without braces using Invisalign.

Cavities

Mercury-free white fillings and painless root canals.

Bleeding Gums

Laser gum therapy and ultrasonic cleaning.

Discolored Teeth

Laser teeth whitening for a picture-perfect smile.

Broken Teeth

E-Max porcelain crowns and natural veneers.

Black Cavities

Advanced decay removal and smile restoration.

Unpleasant Smile?

Full mouth transformation with Digital Smile Design.

Excellence
40+ Specialists

Who We Are

Personalised Treatment,
Exceptional Care

DentiQ is Erode's trusted local Laser Dental Clinic, pioneering comfortable dentistry and welcoming care with a dedicated team of specialists.

Led by Prof. Dr. Jane Smith MDS PhD and Dr. Bala Murugan, our multidisciplinary team of 40+ doctors — dentists, physiotherapists, and neurologists — delivers world-class care for TMJ, orofacial pain, migraine, and all dental needs.

  • Best TMJ & Orofacial Pain Centre in India
  • 99% Client Satisfaction Rate
  • Board-Certified & Fully Accredited Hospital
  • International Patients Welcome · 4.9 Google Rating
Book Consultation
Why Choose DentiQ?

10 Reasons to trust your Smile with us

01

Excellence in Dental Care

Setting the gold standard for clinical precision and patient outcomes in India.

02

Excellence in Cosmetic Dentistry

Led by specialists who transform smiles into natural, lifelike works of art.

03

Experienced Staff

Our superspecialists have thousands of successful cases and years of global expertise.

04

Caring & Comfortable Surroundings

Designed to eliminate dental anxiety with 5-star amenities in every room.

05

5 Star Experience

From concierge service to personalized post-op care, luxury is our standard.

06

In-depth Consultations

We spend time explaining every detail so you can choose your treatment confidently.

07

Ethical Dental Care

Transparent pricing and purely need-based clinical recommendations.

08

Guaranteed Treatment

We stand behind our work with clinical guarantees on major restorations.

09

Convenience

Located in the heart of Palayapalayam with flexible appointment slots.

10

Flexible Payment Options

Easily accessible premium care with 0% Finance and flexible EMI plans.

What We Treat

Our Dental Services

Comprehensive care across 10+ specialisations — all under one trusted name.

Dental Implants

Artificial tooth roots for permanent replacement. Our Harley Street-trained team specializes in keyhole surgery and basal implants, even for patients with severe bone loss.

Explore Dental Implants

Invisalign Braces

Nearly invisible, custom-made clear aligners. View your final smile before starting. Removable for eating and brushing, fitting perfectly around your professional lifestyle.

Explore Invisalign Braces

Biolase Laser

Next-gen iLase laser for minimally invasive gum surgery and ulcer relief. Faster healing, no bleeding, and therapeutic pain relief with zero scalpels or stitches.

Explore Biolase Laser

Children Dentistry

Preventative care including fluoride applications and fissure sealants. We ensure your child grows up loving the dentist with positive, fear-free clinical experiences.

Explore Children Dentistry

Full Smile Makeover

Invisalign

Invisible Alignment

Fixed severe crowding and bite alignment without unsightly metal braces.

Dental Implants

Implant Restoration

Restored full functionality and appearance after multiple tooth loss.

Years of Experience

0+

Happy Patients

0%

Satisfaction Rate

Consistently rated among India's top dental care providers on Google.

Top-Rated Orofacial Pain Centre

India's leading specialist for TMJ, migraine, and orofacial disorders.

Advanced Technology

State-of-the-art 3D X-ray, laser dentistry, and digital smile design.

Personalised Treatment Plans

Every patient receives a custom, evidence-based care plan tailored to their needs.

International Patients Welcome

Serving patients from across India and abroad with world-class comfort.

The Specialists

Our Specialists for every dental need

Expert superspecialists dedicated to solving complex dental ailments with global precision and local care.

Lead Cosmetic Dentist & Maxillofacial Prosthodontist

Dr. Bala Murugan

MDS  ·  Smile Design Specialist  ·  15+ Years

A master of smile aesthetics who has completed thousands of life-changing transformations. He specializes in premium no-prep veneers and lifelike artificial organ replacement.

Smile Design Veneers Prosthetics

Patient Stories

What Our Patients Say

250+ verified Google reviews  ·  4.9 average rating

"Initially I came here with TMJ issue for past 2 years. I visited other dentists but those treatments did not give me proper cure but now I am completely cured. Trust me — visit Dr. Jane and she will thoroughly analyse the issue and give you proper treatment."

H
Harsha Baskaran Chennai

"I had severe jaw pain and facial pains for more than 5 years. I visited many specialists — ENT, ortho, neurologist. Came to know about Dr. Jane from Instagram. After 4 weeks of treatment I am totally pain free. I have never been this happy."

D
Deepikask Chennai

"Doctor John is so experienced that he gave me the best solution without surgery. He was gentle and attentive. Post removal they called the next morning to check if everything was okay. None of the dental centres do this."

N
Nadir Farhan Chennai

"With my recent root canal treatment, each member from the reception to dental assistant played an integral role in making my experience comfortable and smooth. Thank you all."

S
Sunilkumar Balan Chennai

"Totally advanced X-ray technology. Laser root canal with absolutely no pain. Appointment fixed with our convenience. Overall had a great experience and will recommend this clinic."

P
Pavithra Balachandran Chennai

"From past 5 years I was suffering with facial pains and headaches. After 5 weeks of treatment I am totally pain free. Thanks to Dr Jane mam. They treat patients very kindly."

R
Rizwana Amanulla Chennai
